results.name: Let Many Bindings
results.expression: (let ((a 1) (b 2) (c 3) (d 4) (e 5) (f 6) (g 7) (h 8) (i 9) (j 10)) (integer+ a b c d e f g h i j))

results.name: Tail Recursive Sum (50)
results.expression: (letrec ((sum-tail (lambda (n acc) (if (integer<=? n 0) acc (sum-tail (integer- n 1) (integer+ acc n)))))) (sum-tail 50 0))

results.name: Tail Recursive Sum (100)
results.expression: (letrec ((sum-tail (lambda (n acc) (if (integer<=? n 0) acc (sum-tail (integer- n 1) (integer+ acc n)))))) (sum-tail 100 0))

results.name: Pattern Match Nested
results.expression: (match (list (list 1 2) (list 3 4)) (((a b) (c d)) (integer+ a b c d)))
